title: Agent Interactions

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Creates and invokes AI agents synchronously, streamed, or via queue

actors.name: Queue System
actors.description: Laravel queue that executes InvokeAgent / BroadcastAgent jobs asynchronously

actors.name: Broadcast Channel
actors.description: Laravel Broadcasting channel that receives streamed agent events

use_cases.name: Define Agent
use_cases.description: Implement Contracts\Agent interface (or use AnonymousAgent inline). Must provide instructions(): string.
entry_points: class MyAgent implements Agent + use Promptable

use_cases.name: Attach Conversation History
use_cases.description: Implement Contracts\Conversational to supply prior messages[] to the agent context.

use_cases.name: Attach Tools
use_cases.description: Implement Contracts\HasTools to expose callable Tool/ProviderTool objects to the agent.

use_cases.name: Configure Provider & Model
use_cases.description: Specify AI provider and model via method overrides or PHP attributes (#[Provider], #[Model], #[UseCheapestModel], #[UseSmartestModel]).

use_cases.name: Invoke Agent Synchronously
use_cases.description: Call prompt() to send a prompt and receive an AgentResponse synchronously with optional provider failover.

use_cases.name: Invoke Agent with Streaming
use_cases.description: Call stream() to receive a StreamableAgentResponse that yields tokens incrementally.

use_cases.name: Invoke Agent on Queue
use_cases.description: Call queue() to dispatch an InvokeAgent job. Returns QueuedAgentResponse wrapping PendingDispatch for further queue configuration.

use_cases.name: Execute Queued Agent Prompt
use_cases.description: InvokeAgent job runs on queue: calls agent->prompt() and triggers queued response callbacks.
use_cases.implementation: InvokeAgent::handle() → withCallbacks(fn() => agent->prompt(prompt, attachments, provider, model))

use_cases.name: Broadcast Streamed Events
use_cases.description: Call broadcast() or broadcastNow() to stream agent output and push each StreamEvent to a broadcast channel.

use_cases.name: Broadcast Streamed Events on Queue
use_cases.description: Call broadcastOnQueue() to dispatch a BroadcastAgent job that streams and broadcasts from the queue.

use_cases.name: Fake Agent for Testing
use_cases.description: Call Agent::fake() to register a FakeTextGateway. Queued calls record QueuedAgentPrompt DTOs instead of dispatching jobs.
use_cases.implementation: Ai::fakeAgent(class, responses) → sets FakeTextGateway; queue()/broadcastOnQueue() → Ai::recordPrompt(new QueuedAgentPrompt(...))

use_cases.name: Assert Agent Prompts (Testing)
use_cases.description: Assert synchronous or queued prompts were/were not sent using static assertion helpers.

key_relationships: AnonymousAgent implements Agent, Conversational, HasTools + uses Promptable
Promptable (trait) provides all invocation methods: prompt, stream, queue, broadcast, broadcastNow, broadcastOnQueue
Contracts\Agent (interface) defines the public invocation contract
InvokeAgent (Job) implements ShouldQueue; holds Agent ref; handle() calls agent->prompt()
QueuedAgentPrompt (DTO) records agent + prompt + attachments + provider + model for fake assertions
QueuedAgentResponse wraps PendingDispatch, proxies queue-config methods via __call()
Events\PromptingAgent fired with (invocationId, AgentPrompt) before each synchronous prompt
Promptable::withModelFailover() iterates provider/model pairs, fires AgentFailedOver on FailoverableException
Provider/Model resolved from: method overrides > PHP attributes (#[Provider], #[Model]) > config('ai.default')
include_extends_notes: UC2 (Conversational) and UC3 (HasTools) EXTEND UC1 — optional capabilities layered onto the base Agent
UC4 (Configure Provider) EXTENDS UC1 — optional; defaults to config('ai.default')
UC8 (Execute Queued) INCLUDES UC5 — the job internally calls agent->prompt()
UC9 (Broadcast) INCLUDES UC6 — broadcast() delegates to stream()
UC12 (Assert Prompts) INCLUDES UC11 — assertions require fake to be active
important_notes: AnonymousAgent is the inline/ad-hoc agent (no class needed). Named agents extend Promptable trait which satisfies the Agent contract. QueuedAgentResponse proxies all PendingDispatch methods (onQueue, onConnection, delay, etc.) via __call(). Timeout defaults to 60s, configurable via #[Timeout] attribute or timeout() method.
